publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-02-24 18:01:35 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.physdesc: Correspondence, reprints, notes, student papers, scrapbooks, accounts, certificates, diplomas, and memorabilia.
did.abstract: Professional papers include correspondence, reprints, notes, student papers, a scrapbook concerning a Cornell Smoking Contest in which Professor Monroe was the winner, and other material related to Cornell University. Personal papers include Monroe family material; correspondence; accounts; material on Ithaca High School, Cornell University, Alpha Zeta, Town & Gown Club, and Rotary Club; certificates and diplomas; Cornell broadsides; political broadsides and memorabilia; scrapbooks; and local history material on Romulus, Varick, and Ithaca, New York.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Benton Sullivan Monroe papers, #14-12-1356. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Professional papers include correspondence, reprints, notes, student papers, a scrapbook concerning a Cornell Smoking Contest in which Professor Monroe was the winner, and other material related to Cornell University, including records of the Commission on English, 1929-1931. Personal papers include Monroe family material; correspondence; accounts; deeds (1818-1851), bonds, almanacs, and newspapers; material on Ithaca High School, Cornell University, Alpha Zeta, Town & Gown Club, and Rotary Club; certificates and diplomas; Cornell broadsides; political broadsides and memorabilia; scrapbooks; and local history material on Romulus, Varick, and Ithaca, New York.

did.unittitle: McKnight, G.H., Ohio State U. English Dept.
Andrews, Eugene P. re: his approaching marriage
Gutstadt, M.M., manager, Lyceum Theatre, Ithaca
Montgomery, Lois E., Wilson College, Chambersburg, Pa.
Smith, Lou; Ruthschild, Jacob; and Hickey, Joseph F.- joint invitation
Cornell - Miscellaneous correspondence, incl. letter from John Henry Comstock to Wm. E. Sullivan,
Monroe Family - Romulus Post Office Record
Ithaca High School Class of 1890 - correspondence and miscellaneous
Drawings - Dwight R. Collin - Ithaca High School
Regents' Pass Cards - Benton S. Monroe
Monroe Family - Geneva, Ithaca & Sayre Railroad tickets
Ithaca High School diploma - Nina Lulu Elston
Romulus and Varick - local history - printed items
Romulus and Seneca County - printed items
Romulus and Varick - local history - Hunt Farm
World War I and II - Posters
